summary: Completed testing of Driver Performance Dashboard feature. All backend API tests passed (10/10). All frontend UI elements verified working: performance level badge, quick stats, expandable charts section with all 3 tabs (monthly/daily/ratings), working hours indicator.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Delivery user login with phone 0900000000 and password delivery123
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/performance returns 200 OK
✅ Backend: Response contains overview section (total_delivered, pending_delivery, total_earnings, avg_rating, total_ratings)
✅ Backend: Response contains period_stats (today/week/month with orders and earnings)
✅ Backend: Response contains charts data (monthly: 6 months, daily: 7 days, ratings: 5 levels)
✅ Backend: Response contains performance_level (level, color, icon)
✅ Backend: Response contains tips array with title and description
✅ Backend: Performance level logic correct - 'مبتدئ' for <10 monthly orders
✅ Backend: Performance endpoint requires authentication (401/403 without token)
✅ Backend: Performance endpoint rejects non-delivery users (403 for seller)
✅ Frontend: Delivery user navigates to /delivery/dashboard after login
✅ Frontend: DriverPerformance component displays on delivery dashboard
✅ Frontend: Performance Level badge shows 'مبتدئ' (Beginner) correctly
✅ Frontend: Rating section shows star rating (0) and review count (0 تقييم)
✅ Frontend: Quick stats row shows Today (اليوم): 0, Week (الأسبوع): 0, Month (الشهر): 2
✅ Frontend: Working hours indicator shows '8 صباحاً - 6 مساءً'
✅ Frontend: Expandable 'تقارير الأداء التفصيلية' section works correctly
✅ Frontend: Expanded section shows إجمالي الطلبات (Total Orders): 2
✅ Frontend: Expanded section shows إجمالي الأرباح (Total Earnings): 10,000 ل.س
✅ Frontend: Chart tab 'شهري' (Monthly) shows BarChart with monthly orders
✅ Frontend: Chart tab 'يومي' (Daily) shows LineChart for last 7 days
✅ Frontend: Chart tab 'التقييمات' (Ratings) shows PieChart with rating distribution
✅ Frontend: Performance tips section shows improvement suggestions
critical_code_review_comments: DriverPerformance.js correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Component properly handles loading and error states
data-testid attributes present: performance-expand-btn, chart-tab-monthly, chart-tab-daily, chart-tab-ratings
Charts use recharts library correctly (BarChart, LineChart, PieChart)
Performance level logic in backend correctly categorizes drivers based on monthly orders
API response structure is well-designed with overview, period_stats, charts, performance_level, and tips

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements display and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing delivery user with 2 delivered orders this month
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Performance Dashboard fully tested and working. Delivery user 0900000000 has 2 total delivered orders this month, performance level 'مبتدئ' (Beginner). All 3 chart tabs (Monthly/Daily/Ratings) switch correctly. Backend API at GET /api/delivery/performance returns correct data structure with overview, period_stats, charts, performance_level, and tips.

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP
